headline: **MLB Daily Recap**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays handed the Los Angeles Angels a historic 14-1 loss, while the Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles. The Houston Astros fell to the Cincinnati Reds, and the Miami Marlins edged the Washington Nationals in a thrilling finish.

Injuries continue to plague several teams, with Justin Verlander being transferred to the 60-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to left hip inflammation. Kerry Carpenter was also placed on the 10-day injured list with a left AC Joint Sprain. The Los Angeles Dodgers transferred Edwin Díaz to the 60-day injured list with a right elbow loose bodies diagnosis.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place, including the San Francisco Giants trading Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. The Athletics traded Tyler Ferguson to the Chicago Cubs.

top_news.title: **Angels Suffer Historic Loss to Blue Jays**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels 14-1, handing them a lopsided defeat. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the offense and Aaron Civale dominating on the mound. Civale earned the win with 5.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Reds in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dropped a 1-3 decision to the Cincinnati Reds, with Braden Shewmake leading the Astros' offense with a home run and an RBI. Spencer Arrighetti pitched 5.2 innings for the Astros, striking out five and allowing one earned run.

top_news.title: **Marlins Walk Off in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Miami Marlins edged the Washington Nationals 8-7 in a back-and-forth contest. Kyle Stowers led the Nationals' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals suffered a 5-2 defeat at the hands of the Miami Marlins, marking a tough outing for the team. Impact players for the Marlins included Luis García Jr., Daylen Lile, and Heriberto Hernández.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics in Thrilling Matchup**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson and Dylan Beavers emerging as key contributors in the win.

top_news.title: **Verlander Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Justin Verlander has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to left hip inflammation.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Ahead of Deadline**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The move comes as the MLB trade deadline approaches on May 9, 2026.
